@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew_reject
P: widen_window ∧ provider_skew_only ∧ preserve_replay_guard
V: edge_ts_accepted ∧ stale_still_"401" ∧ reg_test_added
A: tune_tolerance ∧ min_fix ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew_reject.
Plan: widen_window and provider_skew_only and preserve_replay_guard.
Verify: edge_ts_accepted and stale_still_"401" and reg_test_added.
Answer target: tune_tolerance and min_fix and add_reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: grace24h_fix
C: overdue_rule ∧ "402" ∧ "24h"
P: inclusive_boundary ∧ single_charge ∧ monotonic_clock
V: no_loop ∧ "402"_after_"24h" ∧ idempotent
A: min_patch ∧ boundary_test ∧ regress_suite

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team="9" ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ compliance_ready
P: bounded_modules ∧ single_deploy ∧ schema_per_module ∧ audit_log
V: steady_traffic ∧ platform_plus_sec ∧ fast_delivery
A: ship_monolith ∧ enforce_boundaries ∧ isolate_schemas ∧ defer_microservices

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: capsule_arch
C: team_"6" ∧ ddl_"9 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops
P: modular_monolith ∧ worker_sidecar ∧ async_enrichment ∧ "PostgreSQL"_shared
V: ddl_fit ∧ ops_simple ∧ scale_worker
A: ship_monolith+worker ∧ defer_microservices

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: secure_download
P: sanitize_filename ∧ reject_".." ∧ whitelist_dir
V: resolved_in_baseDir ∧ no_traversal ∧ safe_path
A: path_resolve ∧ startsWith_check ∧ reject_bad

[AUDIT]
Goal: secure_download.
Plan: sanitize_filename and reject_".." and whitelist_dir.
Verify: resolved_in_baseDir and no_traversal and safe_path.
Answer target: path_resolve and startsWith_check and reject_bad.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sqli
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat
P: whitelist_columns ∧ parameterize ∧ validate_order_dir
V: unit_test_injection ∧ static_scan ∧ log_review
A: reject_unknown_sort ∧ alert_on_anomaly

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sqli.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat.
Plan: whitelist_columns and parameterize and validate_order_dir.
Verify: unit_test_injection and static_scan and log_review.
Answer target: reject_unknown_sort and alert_on_anomaly.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: reconcileBatch
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save

[AUDIT]
Goal: reconcileBatch.
Constraints: "async" and "await" and minimal_change.
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log
V: order_preserved ∧ next_on_success ∧ "next(err)"_on_db_err
A: wrap_async ∧ await_calls ∧ try_catch_db ∧ next()
